summary: Hardened Feishu API success checks, progress card config, mention command parsing, asynchronous event ACK handling, and WSClient startup propagation.

commands.result: failed as expected with 11 failing tests covering Feishu API HTTP/business errors, missing card message_id, reaction rejection, mention cleanup, fast ACK, non-text reply rejection, WSClient.start awaiting, and update_multi.

notes: T1 handoff was read for navigation; no conflict with current source was found.
FeishuApi._request now rejects non-2xx HTTP responses and Feishu code values other than 0 with method/path/status/code context.
replyCard now requires a real data.message_id and no longer returns om_card_stub.
FeishuPlatform event callbacks now start background work and return immediately; background failures are logged through existing logger paths.
The worktree contained pre-existing unrelated changes outside T2 scope; they were left untouched.
